notes: RETROACTIVE ATTESTATION BACKFILL (ENG-OPS-002.R16, remediating GOV-A-001). This task is CSV-marked 'Completed' but on independent re-verification the deliverable does not substantiate that claim. Per the honesty protocol for this remediation task ('never fabricate evidence; honest partial progress beats fake completeness'), this attestation records verdict=INCOMPLETE rather than a passing attestation. What exists: a 16-line 'coming soon' placeholder page.tsx, added 2026-03-15 in commit 2e7bb135ada2108554f853ae04f99e16da4b98bd ('feat(web): add account, lead, contact, and deal subpages') as part of a 15-file batch of route scaffolds — independently confirmed via `git log --diff-filter=A` at the exact current path (unambiguous, single add event, no PR wraps this commit — it appears to have been pushed directly to main). What is missing, per the CSV's own DoD/ARTIFACT list: AccountTiersContent.tsx, apps/api/src/modules/account/account-tiers.router.ts, packages/validators/src/account-tiers.ts, and the context_ack.json ceremony evidence — none exist anywhere in the repository under any name (broad grep performed). No git history shows any subsequent commit implementing this feature past the initial stub. FLAGGED FOR HUMAN DECISION: either (a) revert this task's CSV status from Completed to Backlog/In-Progress and schedule the real implementation, or (b) if the placeholder-only scope was an intentional, later-descoped MVP decision, that decision should be documented and the DoD text in Sprint_plan.csv corrected to match — but that CSV edit is explicitly out of scope for this attestation-only backfill task (R16 forbids editing Sprint_plan.csv). This same pattern (stub-only, DoD unmet) was found across all 13 PG-19x/20x Module-Settings tasks in this batch — see the R16 PR body for the full list.
